replies.msg:
Berkeley Political Science 主要分四個aspect:

1) American Politics
2) Comparative Politics
3) International Relations
4) Political Theory

Upper Division 總共要讀九班
佢要你係呢四個aspect 入面揀一個concentration
(讀兩班Upper Division)
其餘各個aspect各讀一班 upper div
再加一班必修嘅 Research Methods

其餘嗰兩班任你揀
